meaning: adj.坦白的,率直的,老实的vt.免费邮寄n.免费邮寄特权 Frank 弗兰克(男子名)
examples: The talks had been brutally frank.
Frank rasped a hand across his chin.
At the basilica, I meet Frank Tremblay, who takes me to the school behind it.
Alcatraz was considered escape-proof, but in 1962 the Anglin brothers and Frank Morris disappeared on a raft.
